subcodes.first_line: the servant in attendance hath appeared with thy letter and presented it before Our countenance. Praise be unto God, for the fragrance of steadfastness emanateth therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عبد حاضر با نامه ات حاضر و تلقاء وجه عرض نمود لله الحمد نفحه استقامت از آن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
